title: Aritra Wins Runner-Up Best Poster Prize at TYC-LJC Conference 2026
author: SLIMES Lab
excerpt: Aritra Roy awarded second prize for his ComProScanner poster at the inaugural Thomas Young Centre – Lennard-Jones Centre Materials and Modelling Conference at QMUL.

title: SLIMES Lab Hosts MCC-VASP Workshop at LSBU
author: SLIMES Lab
excerpt: SLIMES Lab hosted the MCC-VASP Workshop at London South Bank University, focusing on advanced computational materials science techniques.

title: 1st PhD Publication by Md. Maruf Mridha
author: SLIMES Lab
excerpt: 1st PhD Publication by Md. Maruf Mridha in The Journal of Physical Chemistry C: Using dynamics to determine the ground state properties of g-C3N4.

title: MADD Day Trip to Surrey Hills
author: Aritra Roy
excerpt: A wonderful day trip to Surrey Hills with the MADD research group, exploring the beautiful countryside and strengthening team bonds.
